events.appearance_notes: High activity; When a motorcycle carrying two people drove to the middle of the road, it was hit by a truck. The motorcycle and the person in front of the motorcycle were knocked away.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 16.2s, when a motorcycle carrying two people drove to the middle of the road, it was hit by a truck. The motorcycle and the person in front of the motorcycle were knocked away.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man in white took off his helmet while running towards the person lying on the ground.
events.event_text: From 16.2s to 20.4s, the man in white took off his helmet while running towards the person lying on the ground.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Many people walked towards the place where the accident occurred.
events.event_text: From 22.4s to 67.8s, many people walked towards the place where the accident occurred.
